'''zhazama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oosik|oosik]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oosik|oosik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhazama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzæmæth|zhæzæmæth]] || [[word:zhæzæmæj|zhæzæmæj]] || [[word:zhæzæmæsh|zhæzæmæsh]] || [[word:zhæzæmæ|zhæzæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazazamath|zhazazamath]] || [[word:zhazazamaj|zhazazamaj]] || [[word:zhazazamash|zhazazamash]] || [[word:zhazazama|zhazazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazamath|zhazamath]] || [[word:zhazamaj|zhazamaj]] || [[word:zhazamash|zhazamash]] || [[word:zhazama|zhazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazafmath|zhazafmath]] || [[word:zhazafmaj|zhazafmaj]] || [[word:zhazafmash|zhazafmash]] || [[word:zhazafmaf|zhazafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazamatha|zhazamatha]] || [[word:zhazamaja|zhazamaja]] || [[word:zhazamasha|zhazamasha]] || [[word:zhazamaka|zhazamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazamath|zhazamath]] || [[word:zhazamaj|zhazamaj]] || [[word:zhazamash|zhazamash]] || [[word:zhazama|zhazama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazamathal|zhazamathal]] || [[word:zhazamajal|zhazamajal]] || [[word:zhazamashal|zhazamashal]] || [[word:zhazamakal|zhazamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazamathatha|zhazamathatha]] || [[word:zhazamajaja|zhazamajaja]] || [[word:zhazamashasha|zhazamashasha]] || [[word:zhazamaka|zhazamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazamathan|zhazamathan]] || [[word:zhazamajan|zhazamajan]] || [[word:zhazamashan|zhazamashan]] || [[word:zhazamakan|zhazamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazamathaoro|zhazamathaoro]] || [[word:zhazamajaoro|zhazamajaoro]] || [[word:zhazamashaoro|zhazamashaoro]] || [[word:zhazamakaoro|zhazamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
